title: A Warlord Blocks the Way
description: On pages 15–18, this part follows Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Smoker, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is a warlord blocks the way.
scene: The scene focuses on a warlord blocks the way, with Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Smoker, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Punk Hazard Guards
dialogue.text: Master, regarding the status of the battleship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eventually, they will reach this facility!!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Let's take it down, smoker-san!! Heheh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This island is off limits, you criminals!!

summary: A Warlord Blocks the Way. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
